pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 30 and 69 create resource.calendar with this exact name. Schedule configuration: Mon-Fri 08:00-12:00 (4 hours/day) + 13:00-17:00 (4 hours/day) = 40 hours/week.
setup_task.sh line 39 comment explicitly states: 'Days: 0=Mon, 1=Tue, 2=Wed, 3=Thu, 4=Fri'. Confirmed in verifier.py lines 59, 75-78 where day '4' is checked for Friday attendance validation.

verifier.py line 52-59: Friday afternoon removal is verified by checking if any slot on day 4 has hour_from >= 12.0. Line 71-78: Friday morning preservation is verified by checking for a slot with hour_to <= 13.0. The morning shift is 08:00-12:00 (ends at 12.0), afternoon is 13:00-17:00 (starts at 13.0). Cutoff of 12.0 is the noon boundary between morning and afternoon.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a working schedule named 'Standard 40 hours/week' which consists of 40 hours across Monday-Friday (08:00-12:00 morning + 13:00-17:00 afternoon). Friday is represented by day index 4 (0-based: Mon=0, Tue=1, Wed=2, Thu=3, Fri=4). The cutoff hour of 12.0 represents noon, the intended end time for Friday work under the 'Wellness Friday' policy. The verifier confirms success when the Friday afternoon shift (starting at 13:00) is removed while the Friday morning shift (08:00-12:00) and all Monday-Thursday shifts remain intact. All data is synthetic, based on Odoo's official HR demo data.
